next.formLabel: Describe your roofing job in detail
next.helpText: Good descriptions attract good tradespeople. Are you replacing an existing roof or making a repair? Describe the roof type and shape. What type of roofing material would you prefer? Include the approximate age of the current roof if you know it.
next.placeholder: E.g. Roof is covered in moss and fungus. Would like the roof cleaned and assessed to see if nature has caused any damage...
